title: PacBio HiFi Variant Pipeline — Parameter Schema
description: Nextflow parameter schema for the PacBio HiFi variant calling pipeline.

input_output_options.title: Input / Output
input_output_options.description: Required input files and output directory.

reads.description: Path to input HiFi FASTQ file.
reads.help_text: PacBio HiFi (CCS) reads in FASTQ or FASTQ.GZ format. Example: test_data/synthetic_reads.fastq

reference.help_text: Reference genome FASTA. A .fai index will be created automatically if not present. Example: reference/chr20.fa

sample.description: Sample name used for output file naming.
sample.help_text: Used as the prefix for all output files. Avoid spaces and slashes. Example: sample_001

outdir.help_text: All pipeline outputs are written here. Created automatically if it does not exist.

aligner.description: Aligner to use for read mapping.
aligner.help_text: minimap2 runs locally via conda or Docker. pbmm2 requires -profile docker and is not installable on Intel Mac via conda above v1.7.0.

snv_caller.help_text: bcftools runs locally via conda or Docker. clair3 and deepvariant require -profile docker. clair3 also requires --clair3_model.

threads.description: Number of threads for alignment and variant calling.
threads.help_text: Used as a fallback. Process-level threading is controlled by the resource label in nextflow.config via task.cpus.

clair3_options.title: Clair3 Options
clair3_options.description: Options specific to the Clair3 variant caller.

clair3_model.description: Path to Clair3 pre-trained model directory.
clair3_model.help_text: Required when --snv_caller clair3. Model files are not included in the container. Download from: https://github.com/HKU-BAL/Clair3#pre-trained-models

container_options.title: Container Options
container_options.description: Docker container image versions. Update here to change across all modules.

pipeline_container.description: Main pipeline Docker image (minimap2 + samtools + bcftools + seqkit).
